パッケージ simulation.runtime

package simulation.runtime
  • 関連パッケージ
    パッケージ
    説明
    simulation
    The simulation runtime should not depend on profile-file strings or report-specific labels for core control flow.
    simulation.action
     
    simulation.event
     
  • クラス
    クラス
    説明
    ActionGateway
    Owns cooldown gating and dispatch for typed character actions.
    ActionTimelineExecutor
    Owns post-resolution action sequencing such as follow-up buffs, action event dispatch, animation-duration scaling, and timeline advancement.
    BuffManager
    Owns simulator-managed team buffs, field buffs, and buff collection rules.
    CombatActionResolver
    Resolves an AttackAction into damage, aura changes, reactions, and related combat side effects without advancing simulation time.
    CombatActionResolver.ActionResolutionContext
     
    DamageReport
    Tracks cumulative damage dealt during a simulation run and formats summary output.
    MoonsignManager
    Owns Moonsign-related party-state updates and derived Lunar buff application.
    MoonsignManager.MoonsignBuff
    Buff implementation for Moonsign: Ascendant Blessing.
    ReactionState
    Holds transient simulation state for Electro-Charged and Thundercloud handling.
    ReactionStateController
    Owns simulator-facing access to transient reaction state such as Electro-Charged scheduling flags and Thundercloud expiry.
    SimulationClock
    Owns simulation time progression and timer-event execution.
    SimulationEventDispatcher
    Owns listener registration and notification for simulation-side events.
    SwitchManager
    Owns character switching policy, callbacks, and timeline logging.
    VisualLoggerSink
    Default CombatLogSink implementation backed by VisualLogger.
